message: feat: vuln SARIF/HTML reports, MustFollow taxonomy, and MCP verify_roles (model-proposes/graph-proves)
fix(session): tolerate unknown tool-output variants on resume so one bad cell can't blank the whole transcript

feat(extraction): close Rust symbol-extraction gaps (macros, modules, fields, trait/impl members)

Extends RustExtractor + the generic tree-sitter walker to cover constructs
that were previously dropped or misparsed, all validated against the real
stdlib and ers-rs:

- macro_rules! defs → new NodeKind::Macro (25 variants); macro invocations
  emit a References edge to their definition (fixes the impl_two_step_sync_job
  "not found" miss)
- nested `mod` items → Module nodes with module-qualified child names; free
  fns stay functions and const/static stay variables (module_is_class_like)
- struct/union/enum-variant fields (named + tuple positional)
- unit & tuple structs (no field-list body) are now definitions, not skipped
- trait required methods (function_signature_item), associated types
  (associated_type), and trait/impl associated const/type with Type::member
  qualified names (impl-body scoping + extract_member_variables)
- aliased/wildcard `use … as`/`use …::*` imports
- extern crate + extern "C" FFI decls

Documents the const trait / trait-alias / macro-2.0 grammar limitations
(tree-sitter-rust 0.24, upstream #229/#45) with pinned regression tests.
